Task description (task.json line 5: 'existing product Business Laptop Pro (SKU: LAPTOP-001)') and setup_magento.sh lines 281 (seeded product with SKU LAPTOP-001, name Business Laptop Pro, price 999.99)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting up a separate catalog structure for NestWell Pro with a root category named 'Pro Catalog' and subcategory 'Office Solutions'. A store group 'NestWell Pro' must be created and linked to this root category. A store view 'Pro English' (code: 'pro_en') must be created under this store group. The product with SKU 'LAPTOP-001' (Business Laptop Pro) must be assigned to the 'Office Solutions' category. This product exists in the seeded environment with price 999.99 and initial quantity 50 units.
